recommendations.title: A Royal Affair
recommendations.overview: A young queen falls in love with her physician, and they start a revolution that changes their nation forever.

recommendations.title: Che: Part One
recommendations.overview: Ernesto Guevara, known as 'Che', leads a group of Cuban exiles under Fidel Castro in a revolution to overthrow Fulgencio Batista, the dictator of Cuba.

recommendations.title: Gimme Shelter
recommendations.overview: After running away from her abusive mother, a streetwise teen seeks refuge with her father, but he rejects her when he learns that she's pregnant.

recommendations.title: Utøya: July 22
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl fights for survival and to locate her young sister during the 2011 terrorist attack at a political summer camp on the Norwegian island of Utøya.

recommendations.title: How to Have Sex
recommendations.overview: Three British teenage girls go on a rites-of-passage holiday—drinking, clubbing and hooking up, in what should be the best summer of their lives.

recommendations.title: Surf Ninjas
recommendations.overview: Two Asian-American "surfer-dude" brothers discover they are the long lost princes from a China Sea Island. Part of their inheritance includes magically-induced martial arts prowess and seeing the future. Using their new powers, they act to overthrow

recommendations.title: Grimcutty
recommendations.overview: A suburban teen girl and her little brother must stop a terrifying internet meme brought to life by the hysteria of their parents.

recommendations.title: The Cheetah Girls
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Music, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: A four-member teen girl group named the Cheetah Girls go to a Manhattan High School for the Performing Arts and try to become the first freshmen to win the talent show in the school's history. During the talent show auditions, they meet a big-time pr

recommendations.title: Ben X
recommendations.overview: Harassed by bullies because of his mild autism, teen Ben finds refuge in an online computer game, which leads him to his virtual dream girl, Scarlite. Together, the odd couple seeks revenge against Ben's tormentors.

recommendations.title: The Wild Geese
